challenges.title: Navigation Links
challenges.description: Create three links using the <a> element: one external link (href starting with https://), one mailto link (href starting with mailto:), and one telephone link (href starting with tel:). Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Write three different types of links here -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert html.lower().count('= 3, 'Should contain at least three link elements' assert html.lower().count('') >= 3, 'Should close all three elements' assert 'href="https://' in html.lower() or "href='https://" in html.lower(), 'Should have one link with an https:// URL' assert 'href="mailto:' in html.lower() or "href='mailto:" in html.lower(), 'Should have one link with a mailto: URL' assert 'href="tel:' in html.lower() or "href='tel:" in html.lower(), 'Should have one link with a tel: URL'
hints: Use mailto: for email links and tel: for phone links, e.g., href="mailto:user@example.com"

challenges.title: Link Targets
challenges.description: Create two links: one that opens in a new tab using target="_blank", and one download link using the download attribute. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Write links with target and download attributes -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert html.lower().count('= 2, 'Should contain at least two link elements' assert html.lower().count('') >= 2, 'Should close both elements' assert 'target="_blank"' in html.lower() or "target='_blank'" in html.lower(), 'Should have a link with target="_blank" to open in a new tab' assert 'download' in html.lower(), 'Should have a link with the download attribute' assert 'href=' in html.lower(), 'Links should have href attributes'
hints: Add target="_blank" to an <a> tag to make it open in a new tab
The download attribute can be added to an tag like: Download
